overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a cowboy hat holding a lantern, walking through a rainy Louisiana-style swamp at night toward a lit plantation mansion (Shady Belle). The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with heavy rainfall and warm lantern lighting cutting through the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense swamp path approaching plantation estate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense swamp vegetation while holding a lantern, approaching distant mansion lights

entered.detail: tall grass and tropical plants lining the left side of the path
thick underbrush and palm-like plants on the right side
muddy dirt path through the swamp
large two-story wooden plantation house with warm lights in windows
large oak trees with Spanish moss in the background
large oak trees with Spanish moss in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dense swamp path at night in heavy rain. Tall vegetation flanks both sides of the muddy trail while warm lantern light illuminates the immediate path ahead. In the distance, lights from a plantation mansion are visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt road leading to plantation mansion

events.description: exits dense swamp vegetation into more open area with visible fencing and vintage street lamps
passing another character walking in the same direction ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt road toward the mansion, passing another pedestrian walking ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path toward the mansion, wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: ornate black iron street lamps with warm yellow gaslight
ornate black iron street lamps with warm yellow gaslight
weathered wooden fence posts marking property boundary
weathered wooden fence posts marking property boundary
old broken-down wooden wagons and carts left on the roadside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up from the dense swamp into a wider dirt road lined with vintage street lamps and wooden fences. The plantation mansion becomes more prominent ahead. Another character is walking ahead on the path, and abandoned wagons sit on the left roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation mansion grounds with abandoned wagons

events.description: abandoned wagons become prominent on both sides of the path, creating an obstacle course feel

agents.ego_description: walking through the mansion grounds passing abandoned wagons and wooden benches

entered.detail: broken-down wooden wagons with weathered canvas covers
simple wooden bench on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the plantation mansion through open grounds littered with abandoned wagons and wooden benches. The street lamps are now closer and more prominent, while the mansion looms larger ahead. The path remains muddy and wet from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden deck entrance to plantation mansion

events.description: ground surface changes from dirt to wooden planks as character steps onto the mansion deck

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the wooden deck and approaching the mansion entrance

entered.detail: elevated wooden deck planks leading to the mansion entrance
large wooden support pillars of the mansion porch
wooden crates and supplies stacked near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden plank walkway leading to the plantation mansion entrance. The ground is now wooden decking rather than dirt, with stacked crates visible to the left. The mansion's wooden pillars and porch become the focal point as the character approaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, claustrophobic swamp that gradually opens into the structured grounds of a plantation estate. It begins on a narrow, muddy trail flanked by dense vegetation, where a warm lantern light cuts through the heavy rain toward distant lights flickering through the trees. As the path widens, the scene shifts from the wild swamp into a dirt road lined with vintage street lamps and wooden fences, passing abandoned wagons and another figure walking ahead. The environment then expands across open, wet grounds littered with wooden benches before the camera approaches the looming mansion. Finally, the terrain transitions from mud to a wooden plank walkway, moving past stacked crates toward the mansion's pillars and porch entrance.
